name: SPAR Group, Inc.
summary: SPAR Group, Inc. is a merchandising and brand marketing services company providing sales-enhancing services to retailers, consumer goods manufacturers, and distributors in the U.S. and Canada. Services include new product launches, display installation, fixture assembly, shelf stocking, store renovations, grand opening preparation, and distribution center staffing. With over 50 years of experience, the company uses proprietary logistics, reporting, and communication technology to provide clients real-time store and product condition insights.
